description: 1. A football for soccer games in all weather conditions 2. puma's hi-tech airlock valve to keep the ball bouncy at 8-12 PSI, 0.6-0.8 bar 3. Comes in a catchy white, red, black coloured design with puma leaping cat symbol on it 4. A size 5 football with 19 cm diameter, it comes with a 1 year shape guarantee All you football fans out there, what are you waiting for? Lets see you smashing goals out on the field with this Puma Power Cat football.
